name: Australian Spring Snow Golden Lager
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the malt extract and boiling hops in 1.5 gallons of water for 60 minutes.
2. Add the finishing hops during the final 1-2 minutes of boiling.
3. Sparge the wort into a fermenter using cold water.
4. Pitch the yeast when the mixture is cool.
5. Bottle when ready.
